case_title: SAVRITABEN PATEL VS. JIM MILLER et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, JIM

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT (UNLAWFUL DETAINER) PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, SAVRITABEN SERVED SEP-19-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, JIM
